end,590721+-590721,function(B,G)local S=X(G)local n=function(n,o,U,e)return R(B,{n;o,U;e},G,S)end return n end return(a(325702+4632817,{}))(S(i))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[G(700972-738796)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
